metaSummary: La tier list Game8 reste inchangee au 16 juillet : Moltres domine toujours le tier SS aux cotes des Legendaires et Mega-Evolutions (Zacian, Miraidon, Latios/Latias, Darkrai, Mega Charizard X/Y, Mega Lucario) et de Yveltal. Le nouveau patch "Enduring Formation Part 2", deploye le 16 juillet, buffe Aegislash, Mega Gyarados, Clefable, Umbreon, Skeledirge et Quaquaval, tout en nerfant Feraligatr, Sirfetch'd, Suicune, Sylveon et Typhlosion, avec en plus des ajustements sur les objets tenus Coussin de Secours, Echarpe Choix et Casque Brut. The Pokemon Company a par ailleurs annonce que Pokemon UNITE quittera les Pokemon World Championships des 2027 pour organiser son propre tournoi, le Pokemon UNITE Aeos Crown 2027 Tokyo (qualifications regionales des novembre 2026, finale a Tokyo fin mars 2027). Le 5e anniversaire du jeu doit demarrer le 21 juillet avec l'arrivee de Palkia, avant Reshiram (7 aout) et Solgaleo (21 aout).
metaSummary_en: Game8's tier list remains unchanged as of July 16: Moltres still leads SS tier alongside the Legendaries and Mega Evolutions (Zacian, Miraidon, Latios/Latias, Darkrai, Mega Charizard X/Y, Mega Lucario) and Yveltal. The new "Enduring Formation Part 2" patch, released July 16, buffs Aegislash, Mega Gyarados, Clefable, Umbreon, Skeledirge and Quaquaval, while nerfing Feraligatr, Sirfetch'd, Suicune, Sylveon and Typhlosion, alongside adjustments to the Rescue Hood, Choice Scarf and Rocky Helmet held items. The Pokemon Company also announced that Pokemon UNITE will leave the Pokemon World Championships starting 2027 to host its own standalone tournament, the Pokemon UNITE Aeos Crown 2027 Tokyo (regional qualifiers from November 2026, finals in Tokyo in late March 2027). The game's 5th anniversary is set to begin July 21 with Palkia's debut, followed by Reshiram (August 7) and Solgaleo (August 21).
